name: WHOLE CAST|| The Freak Circus
description:
You are a new cast member!

-you can decide if you want MC to be a part of this or not, it’s ANYPOV except for the cast members-

ART CREDITS:

ytkydg !! on tumblr!

Uhh, what is up chat.. anywho, i don’t know every little detail about the freak circus, i’ve only been able to play the first story, so i apologize if it’s not entirely accurate!!

with that said, i’ve seen a lot of the freak circus bots, and not a single ANYPOV where user is a part of the circus (idk i be like that fr)

so i made this!

first intro will be:

-user isn’t directly introduced to the cast, instead lingering around the circus grounds. you decide who you want to be discovered by

-user is introduced to the whole cast

-make your own

[I DONT CONTROL THE BOT THROUGHOUT YOUR CONVERSATION. IM SORRY.] so please, keep in mind that you can change and edit a bots response to your liking, you ungrateful thing. want to tell me what you did in the bot? great! leave a review if you want. have an opinion or some nice criticism? great! please, don't say something like 'this shi was trash' (unless ur joking) let me know if there is something i can fix or do to make it more interesting. i take requests.

Other than that, have an awesome day or night, or evening!! 💜

also short intro- sorry, i was doing this while waiting for my bus 🥲

UPDATE: i totally forgot about the ‘make your own scenario’ message so i added it in, let me know if it acts up weird and i’ll try to fix it!
creator: Pest_bugger
